description_long: This apartment building is a modern, rectangular structure with three visible floors, featuring a flat roof and a minimalist design. The exterior is primarily finished in light gray and white, with some sections accented by horizontal wooden slats and darker gray elements. Large, regularly spaced windows line each floor, providing ample natural light to the interior spaces. The building is surrounded by a low wall and includes a small landscaped area with grass, as well as paved walkways and a driveway. The main entrance is recessed and sheltered, accessible from the street-facing side. The overall appearance is clean and functional, with a focus on geometric lines and contemporary materials.
description: A modern, three-story apartment building with a flat roof, light gray and white facade, and large, evenly spaced windows. Features include wooden accents, a landscaped yard, and a recessed main entrance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, recessed entryway, and a small landscaped area with grass and pavement.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long facade, horizontal wooden slats, and the expansive grassy yard adjacent to the building.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back entrance, more windows, and the continuation of the grassy area along the side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with a clear look at the wooden accent panels, windows, and the paved driveway leading to the building.
attribute_window_arrangement: Windows are symmetrically arranged in vertical columns and horizontal rows, evenly spaced across each floor, with some grouped in pairs.
